hero.tagline: Intelligence to make better decisions in football

intro.whyProblemText: Football still makes many decisions based on perception, isolated history or feeling — even with available data.
intro.whyAnswerText: Soccer Mind was born to organize, interpret and connect data to the real context of the game, helping clubs decide with more clarity, less risk and more intelligence.
intro.whatText: Soccer Mind transforms data into real sports decision. A sports intelligence platform applied to football, which combines data, video, tactical context and artificial intelligence to support clubs in scouting, performance and sports planning.
intro.whatDeliverInsight: We deliver game reading, projection and decision.
intro.purposeConclusion: All while respecting the identity, playing style and financial reality of each club.

problem.title: TODAY'S FOOTBALL PROBLEM
problem.subtitle: Football still makes critical decisions based on:
problem.comparisonText: Players compared without considering leagues, systems and functions
problem.riskText: Million-dollar investments without adequate predictive analysis
problem.conclusion: Even with available data, there is a lack of
problem.conclusionEnd: between scouting, coaching staff and board.

vision.title: OUR VISION
vision.transform: Soccer Mind was born to transform
vision.transformEnd: , respecting the playing style and reality of each club.

technology.title: TECHNOLOGY
technology.backendText: Soccer Mind's backend was built for professional football.
technology.backendNormalization: normalization by minutes, position and league
technology.backendAI: support for AI models and scoring
technology.backendConclusion: Without a solid foundation, there is no reliable intelligence.
technology.frontendText: The frontend is designed for decision makers.
technology.frontendConclusion: Board, scout and coaching staff speak the same language.
technology.aiSubtitle: Soccer Mind's AI acts as a decision support layer.
technology.scoutingText: Soccer Mind tracks football prospects worldwide in real time.
technology.scoutingConclusion: The goal is to buy before the market inflates.

differential.title: SOCCER MIND DIFFERENTIAL
differential.intro: While many systems show what happened,
differential.fit: If it fits the club's model

summary.title: IN ONE SENTENCE
summary.text: Data, context and artificial intelligence in service of sports decision-making.

footer.description: Sports intelligence applied to football. Transforming data into conscious decisions.
